scope: PEC Enhanced Reporter - Complete Template (Code + Calculations + Structure)
purpose: Foundation of PEC/Backtest - Immutable for stability

verification.method: SHA256 checksum - verify with: sha256sum pec_enhanced_reporter.py
verification.how_to_verify: sha256sum pec_enhanced_reporter.py - must match hash above

what_is_locked: ✅ All 8 report sections (Header, Aggregates, Multi-Dimensional, Signal List, Summary, Hierarchy, Tiers, Auto-Detection)
✅ All calculation formulas (Win Rate, P&L, Timeout, Duration)
✅ All dimension definitions (TimeFrame, Direction, Route, Regime, Symbol Group, Confidence)
✅ All column formats and sorting rules
✅ Auto-detection logic for latest CUMULATIVE file
what_is_NOT_locked: ❌ Actual signal values (always dynamic from real data)
❌ Report output rows (depends on signal data)

change_detection.instruction: If file hash DIFFERS from hash above, CHANGES WERE MADE - DO NOT USE
